Overrides.Override: 15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood
Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Whispers of Infinity Seaglass Amulet Unique ID: c5a55a8978ab3a43e479d41673c1a9dba72b6eba0f8851531f2289ce82a73a72 Item Level: 87 LevelReq: 74 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Sione's Ambition 14% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge 5 to 24 Added Attack Chaos Damage per 100 Maximum Mana +97 to maximum Energy Shield 47% reduced maximum Mana Skills Cost Energy Shield instead of Mana or Life
